item.title: Services
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: Comprehensive recycling solutions tailored for businesses of all sizes. From pallet recycling to consumer take-back programs, we handle it all with zero landfill commitment.
item.excerpt:encoded: Comprehensive recycling solutions for businesses of all sizes.

item.title: Pallet Recycling
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
What We Offer

Our pallet recycling program handles wooden, plastic, and composite pallets of all sizes. We provide scheduled pickups, sorting, and certified recycling — keeping pallets out of landfills and putting materials back into the supply chain.

How It Works

  • Request a free quote with your pallet volume and type
  • We schedule a convenient pickup at your facility
  • Pallets are sorted, repaired, or recycled responsibly
  • You receive a detailed sustainability report

Why Choose Us

Certified recycling processes, zero landfill commitment, fast turnaround, and transparent reporting for your ESG goals.
item.excerpt:encoded: Professional pallet recycling services for businesses.

item.title: Business Recycling Programs
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
What We Offer

Custom recycling programs designed for your business operations. We assess your waste streams, design a tailored plan, and provide ongoing service to maximize diversion rates.

How It Works

  • Free waste audit of your facility
  • Custom recycling program design
  • Scheduled pickups and container placement
  • Monthly reporting and optimization

Why Choose Us

Dedicated account management, flexible scheduling, and programs that scale with your business needs.
item.excerpt:encoded: Custom recycling programs designed for your business.

item.title: Material Recycling Solutions
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
What We Offer

End-to-end recycling solutions for all material types. Whether you need to recycle electronics, metals, paper, plastics, or hazardous materials, we have certified processes for responsible disposal.

How It Works

  • Identify your material types and volumes
  • We provide the right containers and logistics
  • Materials are processed at certified facilities
  • Receive certificates of recycling for compliance
item.excerpt:encoded: End-to-end recycling solutions for all material types.

item.title: Consumer Take Back Programs
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
What We Offer

Help your customers recycle responsibly with branded take-back programs. We design, implement, and manage consumer-facing recycling collection points and mail-back solutions.

How It Works

  • We design a branded take-back program for your products
  • Collection points or mail-back kits are deployed
  • Returned materials are recycled through certified channels
  • Impact reports help you communicate sustainability to customers

item.title: Collection Events
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
What We Offer

Organize community or corporate recycling collection events with our full-service support. We handle logistics, equipment, staffing, and responsible processing of all collected materials.

How It Works

  • Choose a date, location, and target materials
  • We provide containers, signage, and on-site staff
  • All collected materials are weighed and recycled
  • Post-event summary with diversion metrics

item.title: Industries
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: We serve businesses across every major industry with customized recycling solutions. No matter your sector, we understand your unique waste streams and compliance requirements.
item.excerpt:encoded: Recycling solutions for every major industry.

item.title: Retail
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Recycling for Retail

Retail businesses generate significant packaging, cardboard, and product waste. Our programs help you manage returns, damaged goods, and packaging materials — reducing costs and meeting sustainability targets.

What We Handle

  • Cardboard and packaging materials
  • Damaged or returned merchandise
  • Electronic displays and fixtures
  • Plastic wrap and shrink film

item.title: Manufacturing
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Recycling for Manufacturing

Manufacturing facilities produce high volumes of scrap metal, off-spec products, and industrial byproducts. We provide on-site containers, scheduled pickups, and certified processing for all manufacturing waste streams.

What We Handle

  • Scrap metal and metal shavings
  • Off-spec and defective products
  • Industrial packaging and pallets
  • Chemical and hazardous byproducts

item.title: Distribution & Logistics
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Recycling for Distribution & Logistics

Warehouses and distribution centers deal with large volumes of pallets, packaging, and shipping materials daily. Our programs streamline recycling at the dock, reducing waste hauling costs.

What We Handle

  • Wooden and plastic pallets
  • Corrugated cardboard and packaging
  • Stretch wrap and banding
  • Obsolete inventory and equipment
item.excerpt:encoded: Recycling solutions for distribution and logistics.

item.title: Construction
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Recycling for Construction

Construction and demolition projects generate large amounts of recyclable materials. We help contractors and builders divert waste from landfills while meeting local regulations.

What We Handle

  • Concrete, brick, and masonry
  • Lumber and wood waste
  • Metal framing and fixtures
  • Drywall and roofing materials

item.title: Schools & Government
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Recycling for Schools & Government

Public institutions have unique compliance and budgetary needs. We offer cost-effective recycling programs designed for schools, municipalities, and government agencies.

What We Handle

  • Classroom electronics and IT equipment
  • Paper and cardboard
  • Furniture and fixtures
  • Cafeteria organics and packaging
item.excerpt:encoded: Recycling solutions for schools and government.

item.title: Other Industries
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Recycling for Every Industry

No matter your industry, we can design a recycling program that fits. Healthcare, hospitality, agriculture, automotive — we have experience across all sectors.
item.excerpt:encoded: Recycling solutions for all other industries.

item.title: Materials
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: We recycle a wide range of materials responsibly and sustainably. Select a material below to learn more about our certified recycling processes.
item.excerpt:encoded: We recycle a wide range of materials responsibly.

item.title: Electronics
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Electronics Recycling

Responsible e-waste recycling for computers, monitors, servers, printers, and all electronic equipment. R2/RIOS certified processing ensures data security and environmental compliance.

What We Accept

  • Computers, laptops, and tablets
  • Monitors and displays
  • Servers and networking equipment
  • Printers, copiers, and peripherals
  • Audio/video equipment

item.title: Metal
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Metal Recycling

Ferrous and non-ferrous metal recycling for businesses. We handle steel, aluminum, copper, brass, and mixed metals with competitive pricing and convenient pickup.

item.title: Paper
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Paper Recycling

Office paper, cardboard, mixed paper, and shredded document recycling. Secure destruction available for confidential materials with certificate of destruction.

item.title: Plastic
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Plastic Recycling

All resin types accepted. We sort, process, and recycle plastic containers, film, packaging, and industrial plastic waste into reusable raw materials.
item.excerpt:encoded: Plastic recycling for all resin types.

item.title: Cell Phones
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Cell Phone Recycling

Secure cell phone and mobile device recycling with certified data destruction. We handle bulk corporate device retirement and individual collections.
item.excerpt:encoded: Secure cell phone and mobile device recycling.

item.title: Clothing / Textile
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Clothing & Textile Recycling

Textile recycling for businesses, including uniforms, linens, fabric scraps, and returned clothing. Materials are sorted for reuse, repurposing, or fiber recovery.

item.title: Organics
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Organics Recycling

Food waste, yard trimmings, and compostable materials diverted from landfill through composting and anaerobic digestion programs.

item.title: Chemicals
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Chemical Recycling

Safe recycling and disposal of solvents, cleaning agents, and non-hazardous chemical waste. Fully permitted and compliant with EPA regulations.
item.excerpt:encoded: Chemical waste recycling and safe disposal.

item.title: Vehicle
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Vehicle Recycling

End-of-life vehicle recycling including fleet vehicles, forklifts, and heavy equipment. We handle fluid removal, parts salvage, and metal recycling.

item.title: Junk
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Junk Removal & Recycling

Full-service junk removal with maximum recycling. We sort, separate, and divert as much material as possible from landfill — furniture, appliances, mixed waste, and more.

item.title: Pallets
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Pallet Recycling

Wooden, plastic, and composite pallet recycling. We repair reusable pallets and recycle the rest into mulch, particleboard, or raw material.

item.title: Light Bulbs
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Light Bulb Recycling

Safe recycling of fluorescent tubes, CFLs, HID lamps, and LED bulbs. Mercury-containing lamps handled per EPA Universal Waste regulations.
item.excerpt:encoded: Light bulb and lamp recycling services.

item.title: Batteries
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Battery Recycling

All battery types accepted — alkaline, lithium-ion, lead-acid, NiCd, and NiMH. Safe collection, transport, and processing per DOT and EPA guidelines.

item.title: Dumpster Rental
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Dumpster Rental

Roll-off dumpster rentals for construction, renovation, and large cleanout projects. Multiple sizes available with flexible rental periods and recycling-focused hauling.

item.title: Hazardous Materials
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Hazardous Materials Recycling

Licensed hazardous waste recycling and disposal. We handle paints, solvents, pesticides, and other regulated materials with full manifesting and documentation.

item.title: Resources
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: Stay informed with our recycling guides, industry news, frequently asked questions, and educational videos.
item.excerpt:encoded: Recycling guides, news, FAQ, and videos.

item.title: Blog
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: The latest recycling industry news, sustainability tips, and company updates.

item.title: FAQ
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: Answers to the most common questions about our recycling services, pricing, and processes.

item.title: Videos
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: Watch educational videos about recycling processes, facility tours, and sustainability best practices.

item.title: About
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: We're on a mission to make responsible recycling accessible and simple for every business — with zero landfill commitment and full transparency.

item.title: Our Story
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
How We Got Started

Founded with a simple belief: every business deserves access to easy, affordable, and responsible recycling. Learn about our journey from a local recycling service to a nationwide sustainability partner.

item.title: Why Choose Us
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
What Sets Us Apart

Certified processes, zero landfill commitment, dedicated account managers, and transparent reporting make us the trusted choice for business recycling.

  • R2/RIOS certified recycling facilities
  • Zero landfill commitment on all materials
  • Dedicated account manager for every client
  • Real-time tracking and sustainability reporting
  • Flexible scheduling and competitive pricing

item.title: ESG & Sustainability
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Our Approach to ESG

We help businesses meet their Environmental, Social, and Governance reporting requirements with detailed recycling data, certificates of recycling, and impact metrics.

Reporting You Can Trust

Every pickup is documented with weight, material type, and processing destination. Use our reports directly in your ESG disclosures and sustainability communications.

item.title: Our Impact
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
The Difference We Make

Measurable environmental impact: tons diverted from landfill, gallons of water saved, CO2 emissions reduced, and communities served through responsible recycling.

item.title: Contact
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: Ready to start recycling smarter? Get in touch for a free, no-obligation quote. We respond within 24 hours.
item.excerpt:encoded: Contact us for a free recycling quote.

item.title: Schedule Pickup
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: Schedule a recycling pickup at your facility. Choose a convenient date and time — we handle the rest. Available for all material types with flexible scheduling.
